subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast turned towards God! Hearken to the call of the Supreme Beauty from His most glorious invisible Kingdom, as He calleth unto the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من توجه الی الله اسمع ندآء الجمال الاعلی من ملکوت غیبه الابهی ینادی اهل
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action
